title: Occupational exposure to AI is highest among women in high- and upper-middle-income countries
subtitle: Occupational exposure to Artificial Intelligence, by gender and income group, 2025
source: Gmyrek et al. (2025). Generative AI and jobs: A refined global index of occupational exposure. International Labour Organization.
visdescription: This is a stacked bar chart for the world and for the World Bank income groups by women and men showing the rate of exposure to AI by the level of risk.
